input: WITH RECURSIVE base_objects AS (SELECT o.__id, o.__kind, o.__label, o.__workspace, o.__file, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e WHERE e.source_id = o.__id) AS outgoing_edges FROM objects o WHERE o.__kind IN ('Feature', 'Task')), ranked_objects AS (SELECT bo.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bo.__workspace, bo.__kind ORDER BY bo.outgoing_edges DESC) AS rank_in_kind, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY bo.__workspace) AS objects_in_workspace FROM base_objects bo), graph_walk(id, depth, root_id) AS (SELECT r.__id, 0 AS depth, r.__id AS root_id FROM ranked_objects r WHERE r.rank_in_kind = 1 UNION ALL SELECT e.target_id, gw.depth + 1, gw.root_id FROM graph_walk gw JOIN edges e ON e.source_id = gw.id WHERE gw.depth < 3), graph_stats AS (SELECT root_id, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS reachable_nodes, MAX(depth) AS max_depth FROM graph_walk GROUP BY root_id), workspace_stats AS (SELECT o.__workspace, COUNT(*) AS total_objects, COUNT(DISTINCT o.__kind) AS kind_diversity, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e WHERE e.source_id IN (SELECT __id FROM objects o2 WHERE o2.__workspace = o.__workspace)) AS total_edges FROM objects o GROUP BY o.__workspace HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) SELECT r.__id, r.__kind, r.__label, r.__workspace, r.outgoing_edges, r.rank_in_kind, gs.reachable_nodes, gs.max_depth, ws.total_objects, ws.kind_diversity, ws.total_edges, CASE WHEN gs.reachable_nodes > 10 AND r.rank_in_kind = 1 THEN 'hub' WHEN r.outgoing_edges = 0 THEN 'isolated' ELSE 'normal' END AS topology_class FROM ranked_objects r LEFT JOIN graph_stats gs ON gs.root_id = r.__id LEFT JOIN workspace_stats ws ON ws.__workspace = r.__workspace WHERE r.objects_in_workspace > 3 AND r.rank_in_kind <= 5 AND (r.outgoing_edges > 0 OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM edges e2 WHERE e2.target_id = r.__id)) ORDER BY r.__workspace ASC, topology_class DESC, r.outgoing_edges DESC, r.__label ASC LIMIT 100
expected: WITH RECURSIVE base_objects AS (SELECT o.__id, o.__kind, o.__label, o.__workspace, o.__file, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e WHERE e.source_id = o.__id AND e.__workspace = 'ws1') AS outgoing_edges FROM objects o WHERE o.__kind IN ('Feature', 'Task') AND o.__workspace = 'ws1'), ranked_objects AS (SELECT bo.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bo.__workspace, bo.__kind ORDER BY bo.outgoing_edges DESC) AS rank_in_kind, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY bo.__workspace) AS objects_in_workspace FROM base_objects bo), graph_walk (id, depth, root_id) AS (SELECT r.__id, 0 AS depth, r.__id AS root_id FROM ranked_objects r WHERE r.rank_in_kind = 1 UNION ALL SELECT e.target_id, gw.depth + 1, gw.root_id FROM graph_walk gw INNER JOIN edges e ON e.source_id = gw.id AND e.__workspace = 'ws1' WHERE gw.depth < 3), graph_stats AS (SELECT root_id, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS reachable_nodes, MAX(depth) AS max_depth FROM graph_walk GROUP BY root_id), workspace_stats AS (SELECT o.__workspace, COUNT(*) AS total_objects, COUNT(DISTINCT o.__kind) AS kind_diversity, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e WHERE e.source_id IN (SELECT __id FROM objects o2 WHERE o2.__workspace = o.__workspace AND o2.__workspace = 'ws1') AND e.__workspace = 'ws1') AS total_edges FROM objects o WHERE o.__workspace = 'ws1' GROUP BY o.__workspace HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) SELECT r.__id, r.__kind, r.__label, r.__workspace, r.outgoing_edges, r.rank_in_kind, gs.reachable_nodes, gs.max_depth, ws.total_objects, ws.kind_diversity, ws.total_edges, CASE WHEN gs.reachable_nodes > 10 AND r.rank_in_kind = 1 THEN 'hub' WHEN r.outgoing_edges = 0 THEN 'isolated' ELSE 'normal' END AS topology_class FROM ranked_objects r LEFT JOIN graph_stats gs ON gs.root_id = r.__id LEFT JOIN workspace_stats ws ON ws.__workspace = r.__workspace WHERE r.objects_in_workspace > 3 AND r.rank_in_kind <= 5 AND (r.outgoing_edges > 0 OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM edges e2 WHERE e2.target_id = r.__id AND e2.__workspace = 'ws1')) ORDER BY r.__workspace ASC, topology_class DESC, r.outgoing_edges DESC, r.__label ASC LIMIT 100
